segments.text: Gluttony's executing the mixups so calmly is incredible
segments.original_text: 読み合い冷静にやるグルトニーもすごいですね

segments.text: Still reading the opponent's shield and making the right call
segments.original_text: それでも相手のガードをまだ見れる判断ができる

segments.text: Up smash whiffed the confirmed punish
segments.original_text: 上スマッシュ 反確を落とした
生当てで撃墜 追い打ち

full_text: Gluttony's executing the mixups so calmly is incredible Still reading the opponent's shield and making the right call Up smash whiffed the confirmed punish Raw hit into the KO!

corrections.original: 上スマッシュ反撃を落とした
corrections.corrected: 上スマッシュ 反確を落とした
生当てで撃墜 追い打ち
